title: Company History
author: JSL EKOS
description: Learn about the journey of Jindal Stainless Limited from its establishment to becoming one of India's leading stainless steel manufacturers.
learningObjectives: Learn the major milestones in the company's growth.
Recognize JSL's contribution to the stainless steel industry.
Understand the evolution of the company's manufacturing capabilities.

content.introduction: Jindal Stainless Limited (JSL) is India's leading stainless steel manufacturer with decades of experience in producing world-class stainless steel products. The company has continuously expanded its manufacturing capabilities through innovation, technology, and sustainable practices.
content.overview: JSL has developed integrated manufacturing facilities capable of producing a wide range of stainless steel products for domestic and international markets.
majorMilestones: Introduction of advanced stainless steel technologies
Growth in domestic and international markets
Continuous focus on sustainability and innovation
content.summary: JSL has grown into one of the world's leading stainless steel manufacturers through continuous innovation, investment in technology, and commitment to quality.
